title: Osmania University Time Table 2026 Out

detail.title: Osmania University Time Table 2026 Out
detail.short_info: Osmania University Time Table 2026 notification released for PGDDRM Examination May 2026. Check postponed and revised exam schedule details at ouexams.in.

content.text: Osmania University has issued a notification regarding the Postponement and Reschedule of P.G. Diploma in Disability Rehabilitation Management (PGDDRM) Examination, May-2026. Students appearing for this programme are advised to check the revised schedule and stay updated through the official university examination portal.
Direct Link to Download Osmania University Time Table 2026 Here

rows: P.G. Diploma in Disability Rehabilitation Management (PGDDRM)

sections.heading: Osmania University Time Table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: Osmania University has notified the postponement and reschedule of the P.G. Diploma in Disability Rehabilitation Management (PGDDRM) Examination for May 2026. Students are advised to visit the official examination portal for the revised timetable and further updates regarding the new examination dates.

rows: P.G. Diploma in Disability Rehabilitation Management (PGDDRM)
Postponement and Reschedule of May 2026 Examination

sections.heading: How to Download Osmania University Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can check the latest updates and revised timetable for Osmania University Time Table 2026 by following the steps given below:

items: Visit the official Osmania University examination website.
Navigate to the Exam Notifications or Time Table section.
Look for the notification regarding PGDDRM Examination May 2026.
Check the revised schedule and download the updated timetable if available.
Save the PDF and take a printout for reference.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Osmania University Time Table 2026

content.text: The official notification regarding Osmania University Time Table 2026 for PGDDRM contains the following key details:

items: Programme name - P.G. Diploma in Disability Rehabilitation Management (PGDDRM)
Original examination month - May 2026
Status - Postponed and Rescheduled
Instructions for students
Link to official examination portal.
